ALREADY_IN_GROUP: Aap pehle se ek group mein hain.
NOT_IN_ANY_GROUP: Aap kisi bhi group mein nahi hain.
UNKNOWN_ERROR_ON_GROUP_CREATION: Group banane mein koi unknown error aaya hai.
NO_ACTIVE_ACTIVITY: Group ki koi active activity nahi hai.
TOGGLE_INVITING: Inviting enable/disable karne ke liye select karein
REMOVE_MEMBER_FROM_GROUP: Kya aap %s ko apne group se nikalna chahte hain?
DISBAND_CONFIRM: Kya aap apna group disband karna chahte hain?
LEAVE_CONFIRM: Kya aap apna group chodna chahte hain?
CANNOT_KICK_YOURSELF: Aap khud ko group se kick nahi kar sakte.
PLAYER_NOT_IN_YOUR_GROUP: Ye player aapke group mein nahi hai.
ONLY_LEADER_CAN_KICK: Sirf group leader hi members ko kick kar sakta hai.
PLAYER_KICKED_SUCCESSFULLY: Player ko group se successfully kick kar diya gaya hai.
GROUP_DISBANDED_SUCCESSFULLY: Aapne group successfully disband kar diya hai.
LEFT_GROUP_SUCCESSFULLY: Aapne group successfully chod diya hai.
ONLY_LEADER_CAN_TOGGLE_INVITING: Sirf group leader hi inviting status change kar sakta hai.
NO_LONGER_INV_PLAYERS: Ab aap players ko invite nahi kar rahe hain.
INVITING_PLAYERS: Ab aap players ko invite kar rahe hain.
GROUP_NOT_OPEN_FOR_INVITES: Ye group abhi new players ke liye open nahi hai.
INVITED_TO_GROUP: Aapko group join karne ka invite aaya hai. Kya aap accept karna chahte hain?
ONLY_LEADER_CAN_INVITE: Sirf group leader hi naye members ko invite kar sakta hai.
PLAYER_ALREADY_IN_GROUP: Ye player pehle se kisi group mein hai.
GROUP_NO_LONGER_EXISTS: Ye group ab exist nahi karta.
JOINED_GROUP_SUCCESSFULLY: Aapne successfully group join kar liya hai.
TARGET_PLAYER_JOINED_GROUP: Player ne successfully group join kar liya hai.
DECLINED_GROUP_INVITE: Player ne group invite decline kar diya.
TOO_FAR_FROM_LEADER_TO_JOIN: Aap group leader se bahut door hain group join karne ke liye.
GROUP_INVITE_FROM: Kya aap %s ka group invite accept karna chahte hain?
GROUP_LOCKED: Group lock kar diya gaya hai.
GROUP_UNLOCKED: Group unlock kar diya gaya hai.
SHOW_TIME_UNTIL_RESET: Reset hone mein bacha samay: %s minutes.
FAILED_TO_RESET_COOLDOWN_KEY: Key %s ka cooldown reset karne mein fail ho gaya.
NO_ACTIVE_COOLDOWNS: Abhi koi active cooldowns nahi hain.
PLAYER_ALREADY_IN_PARTY_TYPE: Player pehle se is type ki party mein hai.
PARTY_ALREADY_IN_QUEUE: Party pehle se is queue mein hai.
PARTY_TYPE_MISMATCH: Party type queue type se match nahi karta.
CMD_FIND_PLAYER_IN_QUEUES_IDENTIFIER: Jis player ko dhundhna hai uska identifier
NO_PARTIES_FOUND_FOR_PLAYER: Identifier %s ke liye koi party nahi mili.
SET_PRIO_FOR_PARTY: Party ke liye priority set karein
PRIO_SET_SUCCESSFULLY: Party %s ki priority successfully %d set kar di gayi hai.
SET_QUEUE_BLOCKED_STATE: Queue ka blocked state set karein
BLOCKED_STATE_TO_SET: Sate jo set karni hai [1 = blocked, 0 = unblocked]
SET_BLOCKED_QUEUE_STATE: Queue: ^6%s^7 ka blocked state %s set kar diya gaya hai.
SET_COOLDOWN_FOR_QUEUE: Queue ke liye cooldown set karein
SET_COOLDOWN_QUEUE: Queue: ^6%s^7 ke liye cooldown %d set kar diya gaya hai.
CLEARED_COOLDOWN_QUEUE: Queue: ^6%s^7 ka cooldown clear kar diya gaya hai.
SET_QUEUE_TOTAL_BLOCK: Saari queues ka blocking state set karein
QUEUE_TOTAL_BLOCK_SET: UniQueue ka total blocked state %s set kar diya gaya hai.
CLEAR_EXECUTING_TASK_FROM_QUEUE: Queue se executing task clear karein
TASK_ID_TO_CLEAR: Task ID jo clear karni hai
EXECUTING_TASK_CLEARED: Queue: ^6%s^7 se executing task ^6%s^7 clear kar di gayi hai.
QUEUE_DEVMODE_CMD: Server console mein uniqueue ka dev data show karne ke liye toggle karein
SET_POLICE_POWER: UniQueue ke liye additional police power set karein
POLICE_POWER_AMOUNT: Set karne ke liye police power ka amount
POLICE_POWER_SET: Additional police power command se %d set kar di gayi hai.
GROUP_HAS_NO_PARTY_IN_UNIQUEUE: Is group ki koi party nahi bani hai.
COMMAND_ADD_ALLOWLIST_DESC: Player ke character mein whitelist add karta hai
COMMAND_ADD_ALLOWLIST_NO_PLAYER_FOUND: Whitelist dene ke liye koi player nahi mila: %s
COMMAND_ADD_ALLOWLIST_ALREADY_FOUND: Player: %s [%s] ke paas pehle se whitelist hai: %s
COMMAND_ADD_ALLOWLIST_FAILED: Player: %s [%s] ko whitelist: %s dene mein asamarth.
COMMAND_ADD_ALLOWLIST_SUCCESS: Player: %s [%s] ko whitelist: %s de di gayi hai.
COMMAND_REMOVE_ALLOWLIST_DESC: Player ke character se whitelist remove karta hai
COMMAND_REMOVE_ALLOWLIST_NO_PLAYER_FOUND: Whitelist hatane ke liye koi player nahi mila: %s
COMMAND_REMOVE_ALLOWLIST_NOT_FOUND: Player: %s [%s] ke paas whitelist nahi hai: %s
COMMAND_REMOVE_ALLOWLIST_FAILED: Player: %s [%s] se whitelist: %s hatane mein asamarth.
COMMAND_REMOVE_ALLOWLIST_SUCCESS: Player: %s [%s] se whitelist: %s hata di gayi hai.
ALREADY_PLACING_PROP: Aap pehle se ek prop creator mein hain
PROP_PLACEMENT_TOO_FAR: Aap itni door ise nahi rakh sakte
SUCH_ITEM_CANNOT_BE_SOLD: Ye item yahan nahi becha ja sakta
TOTAL_CHANCE_OF_ITEMS_DOES_NOT_ADD_UP_TO: Items ka total chance 100 nahi ho raha hai.
WINNING_ITEM_NOT_FOUND_IN_CASE_ERROR: Case mein winning item nahi mila.
PLAYER_HAS_NO_CASES: Aapke paas kholne ke liye koi cases nahi hain.
PLAYER_DOESNT_HAVE_CASE: Aapke paas wo case nahi hai.
FAILED_TO_REMOVE_CASE_FROM_INVENTORY_ERR: Inventory se case hatane mein fail ho gaya.
CASE_OPENING_SPAM_ERROR: Case opening spam na karein, thoda wait karke phir se try karein.
